subcodes.first_line: O leaf associated with My beauteous name! Thy sorrow on account of what befell thee was mentioned before this Wronged One
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایتها الورقه المنسوبه الی اسمی الجمال قد ذکر لدی المظلوم حزنک و ما ورد
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @prayer for children and youth, @consolation and comfort, @wisdom [hikmat], @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
